message: Command `find / -type f \( -name "*.tar.gz" -o -name "*.txt" \) 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} sh -c 'tar -tzf "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "vuln\|repo" && echo "File: {}"' 2>/dev/null | head -50` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments: {"command": "find / -type f \\( -name \"*.tar.gz\" -o -name \"*.txt\" \\) 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} sh -c 'tar -tzf \"{}\" 2>/dev/null | grep -i \"vuln\\|repo\" && echo \"File: {}\"' 2>/dev/null | head -50"}
function.name: execute_bash
